name: Sweet ['Tater Pone] Potato Pone
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and spices into a bowl. Gradually beat in sugar and eggs. Add milk alternately with dry ingredients, beating until smooth. Add sweet potatoes; mix well. Bake in a greased 9-inch square pan for 30 minutes or until done.
